title: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai
tagline: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple or Sri Mayakoothar Permual Temple is one of the Nava Tirupatis, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Perungulam along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli
overview.description: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple or Sri Mayakoothar Permual Temple is one of the Nava Tirupatis, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Perungulam along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari. All these 9 temples are classified as Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered by the 12 poet-saints of Sri Vaishnavism called the Alvars. The temple is referred to as Shani sthalam, a location for the planet deity, Shani (Saturn).

topPlaces.name: Perungulam
topPlaces.description: Perungulam is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Pannaivilai
topPlaces.description: Pannaivilai is a small village covered by Palmyra trees in Tuticorin District, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Pandaravilai
topPlaces.description: Pandravilai or Eazhur Pandaravilai is a village in Eral Taluk in Tuticorin District. It is part of Perungulam town panchayat and comes under Eral Police border within Srivaikundam constituency.

topPlaces.name: Kottaikkadu
topPlaces.description: Kottaikkadu is a small village in Tuticorin district (Tamil Nadu), belongs to Srivaikundam Taluk and Siruthonda Nallore panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Eral
topPlaces.description: Eral is a town in the Tuticorin district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kurangani
topPlaces.description: Kurangani is a hill station atop the Western Ghats accessed from Bodinayakkanur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kurangani literally means "the place which wears monkeys as its jewels" in Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Thenthiruperai
topPlaces.description: Thenthiruperai is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, 11 km from Tiruvaikuntam and 30 km from Thoothukudi. The village hosts one of the nine Nava Tirupathi temples.

topPlaces.name: Sayapuram
topPlaces.description: Sawyerpuram is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (120 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Perungulam, Pannaivilai, Pandaravilai, Kottaikkadu, Eral.
